
import React from 'react'
import { MDXTag } from '@mdx-js/tag'
export const readingTime = {"text":"1 min read","minutes":0.255,"time":15300,"words":51}
import styles from './document.module.css'

export default class MDXContent extends React.Component {
  constructor(props) {
    super(props)
    this.layout = null
  }
  render() {
    const { components, ...props } = this.props

    return <MDXTag
             name="wrapper"
             
             components={components}>
<div className={styles.Document}>
<MDXTag name="h1" components={components} props={{"id":"about-me"}}>{`About Me`}</MDXTag>
<MDXTag name="p" components={components}>{`안녕하세요!`}</MDXTag>
<MDXTag name="p" components={components}>{`취미로 코딩 배우고 있는 평범한 직장인입니다.`}</MDXTag>
<MDXTag name="p" components={components}>{`평소 블로그를 운영하고 싶었는데 드디어 만들게 됐네요. `}</MDXTag>
<MDXTag name="p" components={components}>{`이 블로그는 `}<MDXTag name="a" components={components} parentName="p" props={{"href":"https://github.com/frontarm/navi"}}>{`James K Nelson 템플릿`}</MDXTag>{`을 이용했습니다.`}</MDXTag>
<MDXTag name="p" components={components}>{`사용된 모듈을 살펴보면
`}<MDXTag name="a" components={components} parentName="p" props={{"href":"https://facebook.github.io/create-react-app/"}}>{`create-react-app`}</MDXTag>{`,
`}<MDXTag name="a" components={components} parentName="p" props={{"href":"https://mdxjs.com"}}>{`MDX`}</MDXTag>{`,
`}<MDXTag name="a" components={components} parentName="p" props={{"href":"https://frontarm.com/navi"}}>{`Navi`}</MDXTag>{` 입니다.`}</MDXTag>
<MDXTag name="p" components={components}>{`정적 사이트 생성기인 `}<MDXTag name="a" components={components} parentName="p" props={{"href":"https://www.gatsbyjs.org/"}}>{`GatsbyJS`}</MDXTag>{` 보다 배우기 쉽고
가볍고 빠릅니다.`}</MDXTag>
<MDXTag name="p" components={components}>{`블로그 호스팅은 `}<MDXTag name="a" components={components} parentName="p" props={{"href":"https://cpro95.github.io"}}>{`Github`}</MDXTag>{`을 이용했구요.`}</MDXTag>
</div>
           </MDXTag>
  }
}
